sprint_goal:
Plan and start Sprint 4: React Frontend (Vite + React 19 + Tailwind CSS).

Break this sprint down into issues for:
1. React & Tailwind Scaffold: Initialize a clean React + Vite + Tailwind structure in the frontend/ folder. Add package.json, vite.config.js, tailwind.config.js, index.html, and setup react-router-dom for page routing.
2. API Client with Sanctum: Implement src/api/client.js using Axios or Fetch. Set up base URLs pointing to the Laravel backend, automatically handling CSRF protection, saving authentication tokens, and headers for the organization context.
3. Auth UI: Build Login and Registration screens. Registration must allow creating a new Organization (tenant) alongside the Admin user.
4. Tickets Dashboard (Board/List): Build a clean dashboard displaying all tickets in a list or board view. Include:
   - Filters for status, priority, and assignee.
   - Text search on subject/description.
   - SLA indicators: A visual countdown/timer or a "Breached" badge on each ticket.
5. Ticket Details & Threaded Conversation UI: Build a detail panel showing the ticket metadata, the Activity Log audit trail (status/assignee history), and the threaded comments. Include a form that allows agents/admins to post a reply (public) or an internal note.
6. Ticket Actions & Stats Panel: Add actions to "Claim Ticket" or reassign it, and a metrics summary widget showing SLA breach rates, average first-response times, and open ticket counts.

tasks.title: Frontend Scaffold & API Client
tasks.description: Initialize React 19 + Vite + Tailwind CSS in frontend/. Setup react-router-dom, and implement Axios API client with Sanctum CSRF handling, token saving, and organization context headers.

tasks.title: Authentication & Organization UI
tasks.description: Build Login and Registration screens. Registration must include fields for creating a new Organization (tenant) alongside the initial Admin user.

tasks.title: Tickets Dashboard & SLA Indicators
tasks.description: Create a dashboard listing tickets with filters (status, priority, assignee), text search, and visual SLA countdown timers or 'Breached' badges.

tasks.title: Ticket Details & Threaded Conversation UI
tasks.description: Build the ticket detail view showing metadata, audit trail activity log, threaded comments, and a form to post public replies or internal notes.

tasks.title: Ticket Actions & Metrics Stats Panel
tasks.description: Implement 'Claim Ticket' and reassignment actions on the detail page, and create a metrics summary widget for SLA breach rates, response times, and open ticket counts.
